stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 figure 2.2.
Using the take-off performance chart for a single engine aeroplane, calculate the gross take-off distance to clear a 50 ft obstacle. Given:

Temperature: 24°C
Pressure altitude: 5000 ft
Take-off mass: 3400 lb
Headwind component: 20 kt
Runway surface: dry grass (correction factor 1.2)
